name: Cloudflare
description: A global cloud network providing content delivery network (CDN), DDoS protection, internet security, and distributed domain name server services. Cloudflare accelerates and protects millions of websites.
advantages: Global CDN improves page load times
DDoS protection and web application firewall
disadvantages: Can introduce latency for some configurations
Limited control over caching rules on free tier
Complex configuration for advanced use cases
